results.title: Mbappe v Haaland as France face Norway in World Cup group decider
results.description: LOS ANGELES (UNITED STATES) - A mouthwatering duel between in-form goalscorers Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland will take centre stage at the World Cup on Friday as France face Norway in a crucial Group I decider.

results.title: Serena Williams’ return set to electrify Wimbledon
results.description: When 44-year-old Williams strides on to the Centre Court she once owned, there will be only one story in town.
